entry.title: University, Dessert and Cat —— Cookie
entry.content:
Gary的音乐

在阅读这篇Blog之前，请将Gary的两首歌《TV를 껐네... (关掉电视…)》和《바람이나 좀 쐐 (get some air, 去吹吹风吧)》加入到一个歌单中，然后戴上耳机循环这个歌单吧。
让我们关掉电视，去吹吹风吧。（歌词与本篇无关，歌名和旋律很适合）

饼

最近有一桩令我开心的事情：认识了一位新朋友，但我不知道我是否可以当她的朋友。她热爱读书，书架里有300多本书；她喜欢甜品，例如Drunk Baker的抹茶磅蛋糕，TonTon的肉桂卷，以及FASCINO BAKERY的香橙卡仕达；她还有一只照顾着她的猫咪——bingo。

谨以此篇献给 饼。

大学，甜品和猫

大学 == 甜品

随着春风拂面，一年一度的樱花季也如约而至。与我有着渊源的同济大学的一条大道上盛开着染井吉野樱，如诗如画。那粉中带着一抹纯白的花朵，在春日的阳光下肆意绚烂。与此同时，饼也与我分享了她喜爱的甜品。于是一个念头在脑海涌现：漫步于大学校园中，找一片青草坪，品尝美味的甜点，尽情享受惬意的时光。

在此之前，我从未将大学与甜品联想在一起。然而，大学又何尝不是甜品呢？它承载着人生中最美好的时光，无忧无虑，天马行空，跌跌撞撞。

行程规划

经过一番折腾，我规划了一条路线：

Drunk Baker

三门路地铁站下车后步行到了门店

窗户上可爱的狗狗和鱼刺？

一眼锁定抹茶磅蛋糕

以后会尝尝的气泡水

上海财经大学

上海财经大学我来过三次，观看辩论赛，参加跳绳比赛和青年志愿者协会的素质拓展。
全是回忆，只剩回忆。

上海财经大学国定路校门

世博经济研究院旁的停车点

第二食堂

马克思主义学院

体育场


第三教学楼

信息管理与工程学院

来上财参观的一家四口，其乐融融

商学院

一个拱门和一个骑自行车的人

两棵大树

朋友和花

退役军人服务站

涂鸦




上财学校里的地铁站，羡慕死了

有没有发现一只猫？

宿舍楼旁的猫


建筑（第二张图里的室内体育馆就是当年跳绳比赛的场地）



我帮Drunk Baker打广告？

有一只黑白色的猫，我没有抓拍到它，好遗憾

躺在自行车阵里的猫

室内体育场旁的篮球场（第四张图应该是教练和学生，学生的表情好像有点不高兴？）




草坪（亲子活动、麻将时间、飞盘和野餐...）








我的甜品时间



天空，树木和飞机


情侣


自习室和自动贩卖机


和我说再见的猫猫（你就是校园巡逻官是吧？）
如果bingo也在其中，那它一定是最靓的仔！
















复旦大学

逛完上财已经是黄昏了，但是既然计划了去复旦大学，那就必须去。
复旦大学我来过两次，一次是观看辩论比赛，一次是参加青年志愿者协会的素质拓展。
（我怎么看了这么多场辩论比赛？）
还是回忆，只剩回忆。

复旦大学的围栏

光华楼


行人




第三教学楼

被投喂的猫猫

楼梯

国旗和标示

生物楼

闯入镜头的邮政车

跑步

物理楼

相伯路

植物和建筑

逸夫科技楼

与建筑完美融合的鸟（好和谐）


相辉堂

奔跑的女孩

300号

一只猫与我的捉迷藏



爬山虎变身为兔子

北区学生宿舍


夜深了，我该走了



FASCINO BAKERY

骑车来到今天最后一站

你跑不掉了，香橙卡仕达，快到嘴里来

后记

一个母亲在训斥孩子：”你是来学校参观的，不是来骑自行车的。”我不禁问自己，我来参观什么呢？今天我拍了好多照片，以下是我这次给出的答案：我尝试去感受植物、动物、建筑、人、美食以及知识的融合，并尝试用镜头捕捉他们的瞬间。

毕业以后就脱离了学生的身份吗？
不，我一辈子都是学生，一生都在学习，只是我不再有学生的身份而已。

晚风吹着脸颊和自行车
好是舒服
等着红绿灯
这个十字路口
行人各自去往各自的目的地

谨以此篇献给 饼
希望你日日开心

entry.title: Free to Publish, Free to ...
entry.content:
World, Languages, Culture

We have many methods to explore the world, and newspapers and periodicals are two of the windows through which we view it. Although the articles from them may be full of political views or not entirely real, we have our opinions to view the content.

Also, we can learn English, one of the most widely spoken languages in the world, through reading the newspapers and periodicals.

Simultaneously, we can also immerse ourselves in their culture, recognizing the pervasive influence of cultural nuances that subtly shape every facet of life.

Movie "The Post" and Phind AI

Today's protagonist is the movie "The Post"

The following content originates from Phind, a powerful AI search and chat tool.

To introduce the movie "The Post" to your audience, you can structure your script as follows. This example provides a brief overview of the movie, its context, and why it's worth watching. Feel free to adjust the details to fit the specific aspects of "The Post" you wish to highlight.

Title Slide:

"The Post: A Story of Courage and Truth"

Introduction:

"Good evening, everyone. Tonight, I'd like to introduce you to a film that has captured the hearts and minds of audiences worldwide. 'The Post' is a gripping drama that explores the power of truth and the courage of journalists in the face of adversity. Set in the early 1970s, this film is based on a true story that unfolded in the United States, highlighting the struggle between the Washington Post and the Nixon administration over the publication of the Pentagon Papers.

Background:

"The Pentagon Papers, a classified report on the Vietnam War, were leaked to the New York Times and the Washington Post. The Nixon administration attempted to suppress the publication, but the newspapers stood firm, leading to a landmark Supreme Court decision that upheld the First Amendment. This pivotal moment in history underscores the importance of a free press in a democratic society.

Key Characters:

"At the heart of 'The Post' are two central characters: Katharine Graham, the publisher of the Washington Post, and Ben Bradlee, the editor-in-chief. Their decision to publish the Pentagon Papers, despite facing legal and political pressure, is a testament to their commitment to journalism and the truth.

Why Watch 'The Post'?

"'The Post' is not just a movie; it's a celebration of the power of the press and the importance of truth in our society. It's a reminder of the courage it takes to stand up for what's right, even when it's not easy. Whether you're a fan of historical dramas, political thrillers, or simply love a good story, 'The Post' offers something for everyone.

Conclusion:

"In conclusion, 'The Post' is a must-watch film that delves into the essence of journalism, the fight for freedom of speech, and the resilience of the human spirit. It's a story that resonates with us today, reminding us of the importance of truth, integrity, and the courage to stand up for what we believe in. So, I encourage you all to watch 'The Post' and experience this powerful narrative firsthand. Thank you."

Frame and Words

No, it'll be an act of solidarity. They'll be defending the First Amendment. We'll tell them that the only way to protect the right to publish...is to publish.

The press was to serve the governed, not the governors.

Of course that's the way things worked. Politicians and the press, they trusted each other...so they could go to the same dinner party and drink cocktails and tell jokes...while there was a war waging in Vietnam.

The New York Times and The Washington Post

About work

Dream back to "Better Call Saul"

All newspapers follow The Washington Post

Run it

Conversation between mother and daughter, one, two...

Literal machine

English newspapers and periodicals.

In the following, I will list some famous English newspapers and periodicals.

Financial Times | 金融时报 | The United Kindom
The Guardian | 卫报 | The United Kindom
The Economist | 经济学人 | The United Kindom
The New Yorker | 纽约客 | The United States
The New York Times | 纽约时报 | The United States
The Washington Post | 华盛顿邮报 | The United States
The Los Angeles Times | 洛杉矶时报 | The United States
The Wall Street Journal | 华尔街日报 | The United States

Free to Publish
Free to Speak
Free to Read
Free to Watch
... ... ...

entry.title: How to use Claude 3 Sonnet in Mainland China
entry.content:
The next generation of Claude: Claude 3

Anthropic announced the Claude 3 model family on March 4 2024, including Claude 3 Haiku, Claude 3 Sonnet, and Claude 3 Opus.
Below is the comparisons of the Claude 3 models to other powerful AI models.


more information in Introducing the next generation of Claude

Use Claude 3 Sonnet in Mainland China

Unfortunately, Claude, like ChatGPT, is not available in China.
The following will introduce how to overcome this limitation.

Prerequisites

  1. a proxy service or any other way to access the network outside the wall
  2. a Google account(recommended)

Steps

  1. use proxy service, choose one of the regions. I recommend the United States or the United Kingdom.
  2. visit the offical website of Claude
  3. register a Cluade account with a Google account
    Here you need to have an overseas mobile phone number to receive the verification code, You can find what you want here. By the way, choose the same region as the proxy address.
  4. then, you can use the Claude 3 Sonnet.

A powerful tool

Here, I would like to recommend a powerful and easy-to-use tool ----Noi.
Noi is developed by lencx.
The product vision is to Power Your World with AI - Explore, Extend, Empower.
I won't show how to use Noi here, please check it out yourself if you are interested.

Preview

preview in claude.ai:

preview in Noi:

entry.title: Mon corps, mon choix, mon droit
entry.content:
花些时间去了解女性所处的处境，给予她们充分的尊重，并约束自己的行为，不要伤害她们。

法国将堕胎权写入宪法

  法国国会在2024年3月4日于凡尔赛宫通过一项修宪案，将堕胎自由写入宪法，法国成为全球首个堕胎权入宪的国家。我不知道其背后有何政治考量，也不明白法学上会有何争议，但我想分享两部电影：《L'événement》和《Never, Rarely, Sometimes, Always》。前者正是一部法国电影，在2021年9月6日第78届威尼斯电影节正式竞赛举行全球首映，并夺得金狮奖；后者于2020年1月24日在圣丹斯电影节全球首映，之后入选第70届柏林电影节金熊奖主竞赛单元，最终获得评审团大奖银熊奖。

L'événement

background: Annie, a bright young student, is facing an unwanted pregnancy in 1960s France, when abortion is still illegal. --from Letterboxd

In the following, I will present several important dialogues from the story, including those with two doctors, the teacher, the friend, and the child's father.

the first time to see a doctor:

the second time to see a doctor(not the first, another one):

meeting the father of the child for the first time after pregnancy:

a friend found a way for "surgery":

first "surgery":

to see the teacher after the first "surgery" (grades dropped because of pregnancy):

second "surgery":

return to the dormitory after the second "surgery".

有一天我会要个孩子的，但不是以我整个人生为代价，那样的话我会狠那个孩子一辈子的，我可能永远都不会爱他。

一种只会攻击女人的病，把她们变成家庭主妇的病。

Never, Rarely, Sometimes, Always

background: A pair of teenage girls in rural Pennsylvania travel to New York City to seek out medical help after an unintended pregnancy. -- from Letterboxd

some questiones you might ask:

Is abortion allowed in the United States?
Due to the victory of Roe v. Wade, the United States allows women to have abortions if certain conditions are met, and the specific laws vary from state to state. But the U.S. Supreme Court overturns Roe v. Wade decision legalizing abortion in 2022.
And the film's premiere is January 24, 2020 at Sundance Film Festival.

Why Autumn needs to go from Pennsylvania to New York?
New York, where a minor doesn't need parental permission to obtain an abortion, unlike in her home state.

影片中有三个场景让我触动：
第一个是Autumn在做检查时，镜头从医院的病房内慢慢切换到无垠的蓝天；
第二个是Autumn与顾问Kelly的对话，也是影片片名Never, Rarely, Sometimes, Always的出处；
第三个是Autumn的表姐Skylar为了筹钱，不惜将自己的身体出卖给旅途中搭讪的一个男人。

In the following, I will show what happened in the three scenes I mentioned, as well as some other scenes.

first singing:

conversation with cousin Skylar:

hospital in Pennsylvania:

search on Google and beat herself in the stomach:

hospital in Brooklyn, New York:


conversation with Kelly in Manhattan, New York:






second singing:

the night before "surgery":


"sugery":

Never, Rarely, Sometimes, Always

一些想法

两个国家，一个法国，一个美国；
两个时间，一个1960s, 一个2020s;
不同的女性，相似的处境。

花些时间去了解女性所处的处境，给予她们充分的尊重，并约束自己的行为，不要伤害她们。

entry.title: The Sweet East
entry.content:
The Sweet East
Directed By Sean Price Williams
Talia Ryder

Don't trust a beautiful woman easily.
Don't be a cowardly(overly cautious) gentleman.

entry.title: About me
entry.content:
welcome, nice to meet you!🤝

🏠 about this site

a personal website for recording and sharing,
about some thoughts and reflections of me,
tools that make life more convinient,
computer science and engineering(obviously including AI)...

👨‍💻 who am i

yuyechuan, a former wayward individual, but now lives seriously.

⛹ interest and hobby

sports: formula one, tennis, snooker
workout: rope jumping, running, swimming
art: books, movies, music, AI
food: coffee, cocacola, Lay's, mom's cooking
game: chess, stitch.

📬 find me in

weibo: @yuyechuan_
xiaohongshu: @yuyechuan
douban: @yuyechuan
instagram: @yuyechuan_
